meaning: adj.有背骨的,有刺的,有脊柱的
examples: Instead, Dr Couzin has built a biddable robot three-spined stickleback.
Joints of some iron facilities should be firmed and regulated when being spined.
Prolux's theory is based on studies of the collared flycatcher and the three-spined stickleback .
He learned from these that the fish, suitably de-spined, are delicious (they taste like snapper).
The opening session talked less of goslings and rooks than of an animal that was one of Tinbergen's favourite toys the three-spined stickleback.
